title: TruAlt Gets OMC Licence; To Launch 100 Ethanol-BioCNG Fuel Stations in India
content: TruAlt Bioenergy has been granted Oil Marketing Company (OMC) status by Indiaâ€™s Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas, enabling it to retail petroleum products like petrol and diesel. The company plans to roll out 100 fuel stations specializing in ethanolâ€“BioCNG blends and expects to begin operations at eight of these outlets by next week. This strategic move aligns with TruAltâ€™s broader vision of promoting cleaner fuels through its existing ethanol supply contracts and future expansion into bio-CNG, 2G ethanol, and beyond.
author: Analysts Account
